title: Kth Largest Element in an Array
problem_statement: Find the kth largest element in an unsorted array without fully sorting it if possible.

examples.explanation: The 2nd largest element in the array is 5.

intuition: Use a heap to keep track of the k largest elements or use a selection algorithm to avoid complete sorting.

approaches.name: Min-heap of size k
approaches.description: Maintain a min-heap containing the k largest elements seen so far. The heap root is the kth largest.
approaches.why_not: Sorting the whole array is O(n log n) and unnecessary when k is smaller.

interview_qa.q: Why use a min-heap instead of a max-heap?
interview_qa.a: A min-heap of size k allows us to keep the k largest elements and maintain the smallest among them as the answer.

interview_qa.q: What if k is equal to the array length?
interview_qa.a: Then the answer is the minimum element, which the heap still returns after processing all elements.
